state_manifold.embedding_function: Enumerate PSL2(Z/NZ), compute conjugacy classes, express e in class-average basis A_i
constraints: G = PSL2(Z/NZ) represented as normalized 4-tuples (a,b,c,d) mod N with M ~ -M
Class-average basis element A_i = (1/|C_i|) * sum_{g in C_i} g in Q[G]
Centrality is automatic for any element expressed in the class-average basis
Idempotence is checked exactly in Q[G]

invariants.name: centrality
invariants.definition: Any element expressed as a linear combination of class-average basis elements is central.

invariants.name: idempotence
invariants.definition: e is idempotent iff e*e = e in Z(Q[G]).

failure_taxonomy.trigger_condition: schema_id mismatch or missing required fields
BFS did not enumerate full PSL2(Z/72Z)
Conjugacy classes do not partition G deterministically
Coefficient specification invalid or incompatible with basis
Provided PASS claim disproved by recomputation
Provided FAIL witness recomputes to zero

determinism_contract.nondeterminism_proof: Generator order, PSL normalization, conjugacy-class ordering, and rational arithmetic are deterministic.
